examples: A Thuja extract is usually made from the foliage.
Thuja Tea is well accepted by people since its launch, especially people who care their health and beauty.
The ingredient of Thuja Tea is extracted from the Thuja root. Thuja is regarded as a living plant fossil by World Conservation Union (IUCN).
Burls can also be coaxed into African thuja by repeatedly burning certain areas of the trunk and branches.
